nodes.name: go.mod
nodes.summary: Go module definition for the RisingWave Go client-library integration test, declaring the module path and PostgreSQL driver dependencies.

nodes.name: go.sum
nodes.summary: Go dependency checksum lockfile for the RisingWave Go client-library integration test, ensuring reproducible builds.

nodes.name: run.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds and runs the Go client-library integration test against a running RisingWave instance.
